nursing service. This section does not eliminate coverage for skilled nursing visits for 
observation and assessment of the patient's condition. (See §40.2.1.) 

EXAMPLE 1: 

A physician has ordered skilled nursing visits to administer eye drops and ointments for a 
patient with glaucoma. The administration of eye drops and ointments does not require 
the skills of a nurse. Therefore, the skilled nursing visits cannot be covered as skilled
